title: A cooling system for cooling an extremity or body part
abstract: A cooling system (10) for cooling at least one extremity, such as a finger or toe, or body part of a human is provided. The cooling system (10) comprises at least one malleable thermal conductive viscoelastic material (11), adapted to be formed into a homogenous body around and fully covering the at least one extremity or body part, thereby providing for a complete and continuous direct contact between the malleable thermal conductive viscoelastic material and the at least one extremity or body part. Moreover, the cooling system (10) comprises a cooling circuit (12) for providing cooling at least partly around said homogenous body of malleable thermal conductive viscoelastic material (11).
claims:
Claims 1. A cooling system (10) for cooling at least one extremity, such as a finger or toe, or body part of a human, comprising at least one malleable thermal conductive viscoelastic material (11), adapted to be formed into a homogenous body around and fully covering the at least one extremity or body part, thereby providing for a complete and continuous direct contact between the malleable thermal conductive viscoelastic material and the at least one extremity or body part, and a cooling circuit (12) for providing cooling at least partly around said homogenous body of malleable thermal conductive viscoelastic material. 2. The cooling system (10) as defined in claim 1, wherein the malleable thermal conductive viscoelastic material is a paste, wax, gel, foam, or a synthetic slime. 3. The cooling system (10) as defined in any preceding claims, wherein the direct contact between the malleable thermal conductive viscoelastic material is achieved without any other material composition, such as a coating, present between the extremity or body part and the malleable thermal conductive viscoelastic material. 4. The cooling system (10) as defined in any preceding claims, wherein the malleable thermal conductive viscoelastic material is provided as a sheet comprising an upper surface and a lower surface prior to forming the sheet into the homogenous body fully covering the at least one extremity or body part. 5. The cooling system (10) as defined in any preceding claim, wherein the malleable thermal conductive viscoelastic material provides a bonding force to the extremity or body part which is less than the intrinsic bonding force between the molecules of the material. 6. The cooling system (10) as defined in any preceding claim, wherein the cooling circuit (12) comprises a flexible cooling pad (121) comprising a channel for circulation of a cooling fluid therethrough. 7. The cooling system (10) as defined in any preceding claim, wherein the cooling circuit (12) further comprises an outer cover (13) for housing the malleable thermal conductive viscoelastic material (11) and at least part of the cooling circuit (12) provided around the homogenous body thereof. 8. The cooling system (10) as defined in claim 7, wherein the cooling circuit (12) comprises an inlet (123) for introducing a cooling liquid into a space (125) provided between the cover (13) and the malleable thermal conductive viscoelastic material (11) and an outlet (124) allowing cooling liquid introduced into the space (125) to exit said space (125). 9. The cooling system (10) as defined in any preceding claim, further comprising a first spacer (14) provided between at least two extremities or body parts, such that the first spacer (14) is arranged at a distance, larger than zero, from each extremity or body part by means of the malleable thermal conductive viscoelastic material (11) fully covering each extremity or body part, whereby the homogenous body of the malleable thermal conductive viscoelastic material (11) remains homogenous between the at least two extremities or body parts in use. 10. The cooling system (10) as defined in claim 7, wherein a second spacer is provided between the outer perimeter of the homogenous body (11) and the cover (13) to provide a space for accommodating at least part of the cooling circuit (12). 11. The cooling system (10) as defined in any preceding claim, wherein the malleable thermal conductive viscoelastic material (1 1) comprises a composition containing polyvinyl alcohol, and boric acid, borax or borate buffer. 12. The cooling system as defined in claim 11, wherein the malleable thermal conductive viscoelastic material (11) further comprises at least one of a thickening agent or a plasticizer. 13. The cooling system (10) as defined in claim 4, wherein one of the upper and lower surfaces, are provided with a coating (111) made of a material being unsolvable to the cooling fluid, whereby the side on which the coating is provided forms an outer coating of the homogenous body of malleable thermal conductive viscoelastic 

 material in use, whereby the coating is provided on the side of the sheet facing away from the extremity or body part in use. 14. The cooling system (10) as defined in claim 13, wherein the coating (111) is unsoluable to water or alcohol. 15. The cooling system (10) as defined in claim 14, wherein the coating (111) is made of silicon.
